Name: REALIGNED
ShortDescription: Vetiver, Lotus and Lime Body scrub
Description: Lotus oil improves the skin texture by conditioning and nourishing it externally. It also neutralizes free radicals. Vetiver Oil promotes the growth of new skin. Its regenerative properties facilitate the healing of wounds as well as the disappearance of scars, stretch marks, and acne.
recipe: lotus, vetiver, lime, cocoa butter, shea butter, coconut oil, olive oil, castor oil, sesame oil, salt

Name: AN AWAKENING
Description: Made with an energizing blend of citrus oils, that awaken your senses and rejuvenate your skin. Exfoliate with Himalayan pink salt grains ,blended beautifully with citrus butters.
recipe: bergamot, lime, lemon, neroli, mandarin , petitgrain,  cocoa butter, shea butter, coconut oil, olive oil, castor oil, sesame oil, salt

Name: COCOA SCRUB
Description: Made with pure shea and cocoa butters, this scrub is a heavy-duty dose of moisture repair for your skin. It has the goodness of Mexican cocoa and Cinnamon to heal scars and dark spots.

Name: INVOKE
Description: This scrub contains ancient magic , it has dollops of Wild Turmeric, spiked with Ginger and sealed with Lime. Blended beautifully with various oils and a touch of butter.

Name: LILY BLOOM
ShortDescription: Lily and Myrrh with Poppy seeds- Body Scrub
Description: Lily and Geranium love teamwork. Together they create magic when massaged with Poppy seed onto dry dehydrated skin, to infuse some Oils that fade away scars and retain a fresh dose of moisture.

Name: UNFOLD
Description: A buttery scrub made with Geranium essential oil which is reputed to effectively eliminate dead cells, tighten the skin, promote the regeneration of new skin, and diminish signs of aging. Blended beautifully with naturally occurring Hyaluronic acid ,hidden in Rose essential oil, this scrub is a floral bouquet for relieving stress

Name: EVEN OUT
Description: Made with citrus oils for mild depigmentation. A touch of tint for a rosy residue. Heaps of moisture to heal dry chapped lips.

Name: OCTAVE
Description: Regularly scrubbing the skin leads to better blood circulation, delivering glowing skin. Soothing Vanilla paves way for better sleep by gently reducing anxiety. Pumpkin seed oil helps retain moisture while Grapefruit elevates the spirit.

Name: A-FIRM-MOTIVE
Description: Made with a blend of skin firming oils like orange blossom and Frankincense , this anti- inflammatory oil helps in restoring skin's natural balance.

Name: LIQUID GOLD
Description: Liquid gold is literally liquid gold. It has gold particles so fine; it melts on the skin making it glow. It evens out pigmented skin, gives it a moisture dose, cools it down and treats it with anti inflammation. Avocado and Evening Primrose oils play the lead roles in this epoch.

Name: POISE
ShortDescription: Wild turmeric and Silver infused Facial Oil Blend
Description: Poise is made of precious herbs and metals. It combines the cooling essence of Vetiver with the healing touch of Frankincense. It evens out skin damaged by sun and wind.

Name: CHAMPAGNE SERUM
ShortDescription: Night  repair serum with citrus oils
Description: This citrus, night repair potion is antibacterial and anti-inflammatory in action. It helps increase the ability to absorb vitamin C. Vitamin C aids in your skin's natural regeneration process, which helps your body repair damaged skin cells

Name: THE EVERYTHING SERUM
Description: Vetiver essential oil has regenerative properties which facilitate the healing of wounds as well as the disappearance of scars, stretch marks, and acne. Ylang Ylang oil is effective in improving the appearance of the skin, by clearing pimples due to its antiseptic, antibacterial, antiinflammatory and anti-seborrheic properties.

Name: RESONATE
ShortDescription: Vetiver, Lotus and Lime Body Butter
Description: Lotus oil improves the skin texture by conditioning and nourishing it externally. It also neutralizes free radicals. Vetiver Oil promotes the growth of new skin. Its regenerative properties facilitate the healing of wounds as well as the disappearance of scars, stretch marks, and acne.

Name: UPLIFT
Description: Made with strands of fragrant saffron, blended smooth with wild turmeric and essential oils of Myrrh and Sage. This hydrating potion is a skin brightener, wrinkle banisher, stretch mark fader and a pigmentation solution.

Name: SYMPHONY
Description: This is a daily dose of nutrition for your skin, face to toe. It has Vitamin E & B along with Omega 3 & 6. With a calm soothing warm Vanilla's lingering presence.

Name: BLOOM FOR ME
Description: Made with a relaxing blend of floral essential oils, this hydrating skin potion is loaded with the gift of oil from the flowers like helicrysym, ylang ylang and geranium.

Name: AGE REWIND
Description: Packed with Vitamin A and E , this cream is a blend of skin balancing oils like Rosehip and Evening Primrose, that are anti oxidant and astringent in nature. It soothes, improves elasticity and adds radiance to the skin.

Name: BE COOL
Description: Made with a super dose of peppermint oil, to provide lasting cooling effect on the skin. Designed to replace air conditioning.

Name: MS. LILY
ShortDescription: Lily and saffron infused Body butter
Description: Ms. lily loves to drop her fragrance wherever she goes. This blend drops bits of myrrh, geranium into the skin and air as it works its way deep inside your skin to erase signs of aging.

Name: ASPIRE
Description: Ginger Lemon takes another form as a layer that covers your skin, face to toe. This zingy zesty body butter jolts the system into "being awake" . Gingers warmth heals while Lime gently evens the pigmented skin.

Name: EYES SPEAK
Description: This cream is designed to gently nourish and reconstruct the delicate under eye area. It has oils like Carrot seed, Rosehip and Apricot to strengthen the skin around the eye. Regular application of Apricot Kernel Oil reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

Name: TRANQUIL
ShortDescription: Clove and Lime Under Eye Cream
Description: Made with one of the supreme spices, this under eye massage cream targets puffiness and redness under and around the delicate eye area.

Name: HERBIPOROUS
Description: This extremely cooling mask is made of herbs and citrus peels along with 35 other ingrediants. It helps to relieve symptoms of Cold, fever, migraine.Sandalwood is an excellent suntan remover, coupled with the goodness of pomegranate oil and powder, this mask also heals the irregularities on the skin surface.

Name: CLEO MASK
ShortDescription: Collagen boosting, hydrating face and body mask.
Description: Made with Almond and Mango butter, this milk-based mask cools, hydrates, repairs and gently cleans the skin. It has poppy seeds for a mild beady massage.

Name: THE 2 YLANGS
ShortDescription: French green clay and oatmeal Face wash/Face mask.
Description: Made with precious oils of rosemary and Juniper berry, this Oatmeal based face wash is a mild cleanse for your skin. It regulates sebum, soothes inflammation and irritation while strengthening skin.

Name: GROUNDED
ShortDescription: Red Clay and Oatmeal Face wash/Mask
Description: Grounded, removes the dirt and oil that clog the pores and provides a gentle exfoliation for the skin. Geru - Red clay is a natural skin coolant . Together with Rose essential oil and Almond butter, this mild face wash removes signs of sun damage like freckles and skin burn.

Name: BALM CLEANSER
ShortDescription: Pink French clay and mango butter cleanser.
Description: Made with Mango butter and citrus oils, this is a one step skincare. It moisturizes and cleans in just one step.

Name: BLACK MAGIC
ShortDescription: Charcoal and Oatmeal Face wash & Facemask
Description: Activated charcoal helps bind the oil and dirt in your pores and pulls them out. Tea tree oil's antiseptic, antimicrobial, and antibacterial woundhealing properties may help make scars less visible. Thyme essential oil is a champ at killing microbes. Rose helps to relax and reduce stress, and it stimulates hormones of happiness like serotonin.

Name: SOAPS
ShortDescription: All soaps are made to order based on the Essential Oil preference of the Customer.
Description: Poppy seed Scrub Soap | Charcoal soap | Layered Scrub soaps | Loofah Scrub Soaps | Oatmeal Scrub Soaps | Vetiver root Scrub soaps

Name: PMS BUSTER
Description: Made with magical healing oils, blend with a touch of ginger, rosemary, vetiver and thyme to provide an even layer of pain relief.

Name: PUCKER UP
Description: Kokum butter comes alive with a sparkly blend of cooling and citrus notes for a mild depigmentation action.

Name: NEEM DREAM
ShortDescription: Neem, Mint and Saffron healing salve
Description: Ideal for managing irritation caused by Psoriasis, Eczema and Prickly heat. Neel oil combined with wild turmeric and mint are the key ingredients to this skin potion. It also contains Oils of Argan, Black seed and heaps of Saffron.

Name: INVOLVE
Description: Rosemary essential oil has antiseptic properties and a fresh herbaceous aroma. Beeswax softens lips and seals in moisture for lasting protection. It is also antibacterial, high in vitamin A, and soothes dry and flaky skin. Together with sweet almond oil, it is a healing shine for your lip.

Name: INFUSE
Description: Scented mildly with lavender this Lip balm helps in treating peeling, cracking and chapped Lips. Blend with a touch of healing carrot seed oil , this Balm helps restore dry lips back to baby lips, all soft and plush.
